code: import{io}from"socket.io-client";import{getToken}from"../utils/auth";const SOCKET_BASE=process.env.REACT_APP_SOCKET_BASE||"http://localhost:5000";let socket;export const connectSocket=()=>{var _socket;if((_socket=socket)!==null&&_socket!==void 0&&_socket.connected)return socket;socket=io(SOCKET_BASE,{transports:["websocket"],auth:{token:getToken()}});return socket;};export const getSocket=()=>socket;export const disconnectSocket=()=>{if(socket){socket.disconnect();socket=null;}};
